dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Alright, guys, let's review the safety procedures for landing."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Uh, safety procedures? I didn't know we were landing yet."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, eyes scanning the instruments with confidence.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, brow furrowed with worry, hands grasping the armrests.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "And don't forget to fasten your seatbelts, everyone. We're starting our descent."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, a reassuring smile spreading across his face.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "I'm telling you, Sam, the turbulence is just a minor setback. We'll be on the ground in no time."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "But what if the plane crashes? We could all die!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, his words dripping with conviction as he gestures with his hands.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "Hey, guys, don't worry. We're in good hands with Captain Ali. He's the best pilot around."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, his voice rising in panic, eyes darting around the cabin.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Everyone, please remain seated until we've come to a complete stop."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of the plane, the wheels screeching to a halt on the runway.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, a mix of relief and exhaustion etched on his face.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "Welcome to our destination, folks! Please stay seated while the plane is being cleaned and prepared for the next flight."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, a triumphant grin spreading across his face.
